title: 7 Herbal Teas For Dry Nose
description: Salvia officinalis teas contains compounds like rosmarinic acid and ursolic acid that have anti-inflammatory properties, which can help soothe a dry nose. These compounds can reduce inflammation in the nasal passages, making it easier to breathe. The antimicrobial properties of Salvia officinalis teas can also help fight off infections that may be contributing to the dryness.
